Submodules¶

app.exceptions module¶

Custom exception classes for the Grand Line Character Builder API.

All exceptions inherit from RPGBaseException so callers can catch either specific errors or all application errors with one handler.

exception app.exceptions.CharacterNotFoundException(character_id: int)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a character cannot be found in the database.

character_id¶

The ID that was not found.

exception app.exceptions.ClassNotFoundException(class_name: str)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a character class name does not exist in the database.

class_name¶

The class name that was not found.

exception app.exceptions.InvalidCharacterNameError(name: str)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a character name is empty or exceeds 50 characters.

name¶

The invalid name that was provided.

exception app.exceptions.InvalidLevelError(level: int)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a character level is outside the allowed range of 1 to 20.

level¶

The invalid level that was provided.

exception app.exceptions.InvalidStatValueError(stat_name: str, value: int)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a stat value is outside the allowed range of 1 to 20.

stat_name¶

The name of the invalid stat.

value¶

The invalid value that was provided.

exception app.exceptions.RPGBaseException[source]¶

Bases: Exception

Base exception class for all Grand Line Character Builder errors.

All custom exceptions in this application inherit from this class, allowing routes to catch any application error with a single except.

exception app.exceptions.RaceNotFoundException(race_name: str)[source]¶

Bases: RPGBaseException

Raised when a race name does not exist in the database.

race_name¶

The race name that was not found.

app.logging_config module¶

Logging configuration for the Grand Line Character Builder.

Sets up structured logging with two handlers: - Console handler at INFO level for runtime visibility. - File handler at DEBUG level for detailed debugging in rpg_app.log.

app.logging_config.setup_logging() → None[source]¶

Configure the root logger with console and file handlers.

Sets the root logger to DEBUG level so all messages are captured. The console handler filters to INFO and above to avoid noise in the terminal, while the file handler captures everything from DEBUG upwards for detailed troubleshooting.

The log format includes timestamp, level, logger name, and message. Logs are written to rpg_app.log in the project root directory.

Module contents¶

app.create_app(testing: bool = False) → Flask[source]¶

Create and configure the Flask application.

Sets up the database, logging, blueprints, and seeds initial data when running for the first time.

Parameters:

testing – If True, uses an in-memory SQLite database.

Returns:

The configured Flask application instance.

Return type:

Flask

Grand Line Character Builder
